formulas.label: fd1
formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}\text{Minimize} & c^{\mathsf{T}} \pi & \\ \text{subject} \text{to} & l_{a} \leq \pi_{v} - \pi_{u} + p_{a} T \leq u_{a} & \forall a = \left(u , v\right) \in A , \\ & 0 \leq \pi_{v} \leq T - \delta & \forall v \in V , \\ & p_{a} \in \mathbb{Z} & \forall a \in A .\end{matrix}

formulas.label: ufd2
formulas.latex: \underset{a \in C^{+}}{\sum} x_{a} - \underset{a \in C^{-}}{\sum} x_{a} = T q_{C}

formulas.label: fd2
formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}\text{Minimize} & c^{\mathsf{T}} x & \\ \text{subject} \text{to} & l_{a} \leq x_{a} \leq u_{a} & \forall a \in A , \\ & \underset{a \in C^{+}}{\sum} x_{a} - \underset{a \in C^{-}}{\sum} x_{a} = T q_{C} & \forall C \in \mathcal{C}_{B} , \\ & q_{C} \in \mathbb{Z} & \forall C \in \mathcal{C}_{B} .\end{matrix}

formulas.label: fd3
formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}\text{Minimize} & c^{\mathsf{T}} x & \\ \text{subject} \text{to} & l_{a} \leq x_{a} \leq u_{a} & \forall a \in A , \\ & \underset{a \in C^{+}}{\sum} x_{a} - \underset{a \in C^{-}}{\sum} x_{a} = T q_{C} & \forall C \in \mathcal{C}_{B} , \\ & q_{C} \in \mathbb{Z} & \forall C \in \mathcal{C}_{B} , \\ & \underset{a \in C^{+}}{\sum} x_{a} - \underset{a \in C^{-}}{\sum} x_{a} = 0 & \forall C \in \mathcal{C}_{N} .\end{matrix}
